languages.text: "Хм... когда-то этим миром управляли блестящие служители Омниссии. А сейчас никто из них не вспомнит даже простейшее таинство опознания для "Галливеруса"". {n}Синтезированный голос Себериана приобретает откровенно сварливые нотки.{/n} "Что за времена настали..."

"Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."
languages.original_text: "Хм... когда-то этим миром управляли блестящие служители Омниссии. А сейчас никто из них не вспомнит даже простейшее таинство опознания для "Галливеруса"". {n}Синтезированный голос Себериана приобретает откровенно сварливые нотки.{/n} "Что за времена настали..."

traits.locale_text: "Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

"Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

"Hmm... this world was once ruled by the illustrious servants of the Omnissiah... and now I'd bet not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

"Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

"Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

languages.text: 「うーん…この世界はかつて、オムニシアの偉大なしもべによって支配されていた…そして今、彼ら一人も、ガリヴァレウスの簡単な身分証明書さえも覚えていないだろう」{n}セベリアンの合成音声は、怒りっぽい口調に変わる。{/n}「時代は変わったものだ…」
languages.original_text: "Hmm... this world was once ruled by the illustrious servants of the Omnissiah... and now I'd bet not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

traits.locale_text: 「うーん…この世界はかつて、オムニシアの偉大なしもべによって支配されていた…そして今、彼ら一人も、ガリヴァレウスの簡単な身分証明書さえも覚えていないだろう」{n}セベリアンの合成音声は、怒りっぽい口調に変わる。「時代は変わったものだ…」

languages.text: “嗯……这个世界曾由欧姆尼赛亚最具智慧的仆从统治……而现在，他们中没一个人还记得该如何为加里弗鲁斯执行最简单的身份识别圣礼。”{n}塞贝里安的合成音中透出一股烦躁。{/n}“你身处的，究竟是个什么世道……”
languages.original_text: "Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

traits.locale_text: “嗯……这个世界曾由欧姆尼赛亚最具智慧的仆从统治……而现在，他们中没一个人还记得该如何为加里弗鲁斯执行最简单的身份识别圣礼。”{n}塞贝里安的合成音中透出一股烦躁。{/n}“你身处的，究竟是个什么世道……”

languages.text: «Mmm... Antaño, este mundo estaba gobernado por los más sabios sirvientes del Omnissiah. Ahora, ninguno de ellos podría recordar el sencillo sacramento de identificación de Galliverus». {n}La voz sintetizada de Seberian adopta un cariz irascible.{/n} «Menuda época le ha tocado vivir...».
languages.original_text: "Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

traits.locale_text: «Mmm... Antaño, este mundo estaba gobernado por los más sabios sirvientes del Omnissiah. Ahora, ninguno de ellos podría recordar el sencillo sacramento de identificación de Galliverus». {n}La voz sintetizada de Seberian adopta un cariz irascible.{/n} «Menuda época le ha tocado vivir...».

languages.text: "Hmm ... diese Welt wurde einst von den weisesten Dienern des Omnissiah regiert. Heute kennen sie nicht einmal das einfache Sakrament der Identifikation für Galliverus." {n}Seberians synthetisierte Stimme nimmt eine gereizte Note an.{/n} "In welchen Zeiten lebt Ihr ..."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

traits.locale_text: "Hmm ... diese Welt wurde einst von den weisesten Dienern des Omnissiah regiert. Heute kennen sie nicht einmal das einfache Sakrament der Identifikation für Galliverus." {n}Seberians synthetisierte Stimme nimmt eine gereizte Note an.{/n} "In welchen Zeiten lebt Ihr ..."

languages.text: « Ce monde était autrefois gouverné par les illustres serviteurs de l'Omnimessie... mais aujourd'hui, aucun d'entre eux ne se souvient ne serait-ce que du simple sacrement d'identification de Galliverus. Où va le monde... » {n}ajoute Seberian sur un ton irascible.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

traits.locale_text: « Ce monde était autrefois gouverné par les illustres serviteurs de l'Omnimessie... mais aujourd'hui, aucun d'entre eux ne se souvient ne serait-ce que du simple sacrement d'identification de Galliverus. Où va le monde... » {n}ajoute Seberian sur un ton irascible.{/n}

languages.text: "Ha... Bu dünya bir zamanlar Hermesih'in bilge hizmetkârlarınca yönetiliyordu... Şimdi hiçbiri Galliverus'un basit kimlik saptama ayinini bile hatırlayamıyordur." {n}Seberian'ın sentezlenmiş sesi, hırçın bir tını alıyor.{/n} "Ne günlere kalmışsınız..."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... this world was once ruled by the wisest servants of the Omnissiah. Now, not one of them could recall even the simple sacrament of identification for Galliverus." {n}Seberian's synthesised voice takes on an irascible note.{/n} "What times you live in..."

traits.locale_text: "Ha... Bu dünya bir zamanlar Hermesih'in bilge hizmetkârlarınca yönetiliyordu... Şimdi hiçbiri Galliverus'un basit kimlik saptama ayinini bile hatırlayamıyordur." {n}Seberian'ın sentezlenmiş sesi, hırçın bir tını alıyor.{/n} "Ne günlere kalmışsınız..."
